arguments.label: subagent-reg-protocol
arguments.task:
## Task: Subagent Registration Protocol

Create a complete subagent registration protocol for the ai_final agent hierarchy with the following components:

### 1. Port Allocator (port_allocator.py)
- Manage port range 19000-19100
- Track assigned/available ports
- Assign ports on registration request
- Release ports on deregistration
- Persist state to JSON file

### 2. FastAPI Code Template (templates/manager_worker_template.py)
- Complete FastAPI app structure for manager/worker pairs
- BaseManager class with:
  - /health endpoint (30s heartbeat)
  - /capabilities endpoint returning JSON schema
  - /register endpoint for worker registration
  - Port allocation integration
- BaseWorker class with:
  - Automatic manager discovery
  - Health check ping
  - Capability registration

### 3. Registration Service (registration_service.py)
- FastAPI service running on port 18999 (registry service)
- Endpoints:
  - POST /register: allocate port, return config
  - POST /deregister: release port
  - GET /agents: list active agents with ports
  - GET /ports: show port allocation status
- Store agent manifests in YAML format

### 4. YAML Configuration Schema (schemas/agent_manifest.yaml)
- Agent metadata (name, type, role, version)
- Capabilities list with schemas
- Dependencies
- Resource requirements

### 5. Health Check Integration (health_client.py)
- Async HTTP client for health pings
- Configurable interval (default 30s)
- Automatic re-registration on failure
- Circuit breaker pattern

### File Structure to Create:
```
subagent-registry/
├── port_allocator.py
├── registration_service.py
├── health_client.py
├── templates/
│   ├── __init__.py
│   └── manager_worker_template.py
├── schemas/
│   └── agent_manifest.yaml
└── example_usage.py
```

### Technical Requirements:
- Use FastAPI with uvicorn
- Use Pydantic v2 for models
- Type hints throughout
- Async/await where appropriate
- Include error handling and logging
- Add docstrings for all public methods

### Deliverables:
All files in workspace folder: subagent-registry/

Validate your work by running registration_service.py and testing with curl commands.
